content: {"title":"ADR-001: App Structure","status":"accepted","decision":"Next.js 14 App Router with route groups: (marketing)/landing, (auth)/login+register, (app)/dashboard+notes+checkins+pet+games. Prisma+PostgreSQL. NextAuth.js credentials provider. Tailwind CSS with cute design tokens.","rationale":"App Router enables RSC for fast loads, route groups keep concerns separated, NextAuth provides battle-tested auth."}

{"title":"ADR-002: DB Schema","status":"accepted","models":["User","CoupleSpace","Invitation","Note","CheckIn","Pet","GameSession","TriviaQuestion","Streak"],"constraints":"CoupleSpace max 2 members enforced at application level. Invitation codes are 8-char alphanumeric with 48hr expiry. Mood is enum: HAPPY, SAD, EXCITED, TIRED, LOVING, NEUTRAL."}

{"title":"ADR-003: UI Design System","status":"accepted","palette":{"primary":"rose-400","secondary":"pink-300","accent":"lavender-400","bg":"cream/rose-50","card":"white with shadow-sm"},"components":["CuteCard","MoodPicker","PetAvatar","GameBoard","StreakBadge","HeartButton"],"animations":"Framer Motion for page transitions, hover scales, heart pulses"}

{"issue":"Login failed with 'Invalid email or password'","root_cause":"Database user 'loveboard' did not exist. User was running Postgres.app locally (not Docker), with only postgres and kylezhao users available. The .env DATABASE_URL referenced a non-existent loveboard user.","fix":"Created loveboard user + database in local Postgres. Ran prisma db push + seed.","verified":"bcrypt.compare confirms password123 matches stored hash."}

{"title":"ADR-004: Bento Grid Dashboard Redesign","status":"accepted","decision":"Replace link-button dashboard with unified bento grid layout. All features visible as inline cells: quick note input, today's trivia, mood check-in widget, pet status with react-kawaii SVGs, streaks, partner status. No navigation needed for basic actions.","assets":"react-kawaii for cute SVG illustrations with mood states. Replaces emoji-only approach."}

{"title":"Dashboard Redesign v2","changes":["Replaced link-button grid with bento cell layout","Inline QuickNote widget with color picker and scrollable history","Inline CheckInWidget with mood grid and partner status","Inline PetWidget with react-kawaii SVG characters (Ghost/Cat/Planet/IceCream/SpeechBubble) replacing emojis","Inline TriviaWidget with random daily question","StreaksWidget with progress bars","PartnerHeader with avatar stack","Landing page uses react-kawaii floating characters","Background gradient (cream → rose → lavender)","bento-cell class with glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur)","Custom thin scrollbar CSS"],"packages_added":["react-kawaii"],"tests":"43 passing"}

{"title":"ADR-005: V3 Dashboard Overhaul","changes":["Remove sub-page nav tabs - single screen dashboard","Kawaii moods replace emoji in check-in","Photo upload cell with caption","Pixel drawing canvas game (shared, persisted)","Remove redundant Love Trivia game page","40+ deep trivia questions","Days together counter cell","Settings page (preferences, unpair, sign out)","Kawaii logo character instead of emoji","Memory Match stays, add pixel canvas as Game B"]}

{"status":"complete","version":"v3","changes":["Bento dashboard with all widgets inline","Kawaii mood characters replace emojis in check-in (Ghost/Cat/Planet/IceCream/SpeechBubble/Mug)","Photo upload cell with lightbox and captions","Pixel Canvas collaborative drawing game (32x32 grid, 20 colors, draw/erase, save/clear)","Days Together counter with kawaii Planet character","40+ deep meaningful trivia questions across 8 categories","Settings page with profile edit, space name, unpair, sign out","Minimal top nav bar with kawaii Ghost logo + settings gear","Removed redundant Love Trivia game page (trivia lives in dashboard widget)","Removed bottom tab nav entirely","Memory Match game retained","Seeded pixel canvas with pre-drawn heart"],"tests":"43 passing"}
When user says 'use ruflo MCP', initialize/use ruflo swarm and spawn/coordinate multiple parallel specialized agents for the task. Avoid single-agent terminal-only workflow.
